PRINTJanuary 20, 2024

Wayfinding & Signage System

  • WAYFINDING
  • SIGNAGE
  • ENVIRONMENTAL
  • PICTOGRAMS

A comprehensive wayfinding and signage system for a multi-building cultural campus. The project encompasses exterior directional signage, building identification, interior room numbering, accessibility compliance, and a custom pictogram suite designed for multilingual visitors.

The system uses a warm material palette (brushed brass, smoked oak, matte black aluminum) that ages gracefully and references the campus's industrial heritage.

TOOLS

  • Illustrator
  • InDesign
  • Figma
  • Rhino
